archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) / 5 (Jewel & Luxury) Hybrid - Warm Editorial Luxe

typography.pairing_strategy: Elegant Serif Headings + Geometric Sans-Serif Body for an editorial Vogue-like aesthetic.

rules.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast. Use Charcoal (#1A1A1A) for readability on ivory backgrounds.
rules.accents: Use Deep Rose/Blush sparingly for primary CTAs and active states.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 to create 'breathing room' typical of luxury editorial design.
layout.surfaces: Minimal borders. Use soft ambient shadows shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] on white cards placed over the ivory base.
layout.radius: Feminine softness: use rounded-2xl for cards and major elements, rounded-full for badges and primary buttons.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis for a premium momentum feel.
motion.hover: Images should have a slow, luxurious scale-up effect: transition-transform duration-700 ease-out hover:scale-105.
motion.micro_interactions: Soft opacity fades and slight upward nudges on hover (-translate-y-1 duration-300).

components.button_primary: bg-[#9C4154] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#8A3648] transition-all
components.button_secondary: border border-[#E8E3DA] text-[#1A1A1A] rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#F5F2EB] transition-all
components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-transparent hover:border-[#E8E3DA] transition-all duration-300
components.badge: bg-[#F2E8EB] text-[#9C4154] text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold

Landing.hero: Split layout or large edge-to-edge image. 60% Image (Indian women fashion, laughing), 40% Typography. CTA: 'Rent a Look. List Yours.'
Landing.how_it_works: 3-column bento grid with soft pastel blush background.
Landing.featured_feed: Horizontal scrolling carousel or masonry grid of top rented dresses nearby.

Auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Beautiful silk fabric or lifestyle image. Right: Clean, centered login/signup form with rounded inputs.
Auth.inputs: Shadcn standard but heavily customized: h-12, rounded-xl, bg-[#F5F2EB], border-none, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#9C4154]

Home_Feed.layout: Sticky filter bar at top. Masonry or rigid 3-column grid for dress cards.
Home_Feed.card_anatomy: Image (aspect-[3/4] object-cover rounded-xl), Title, Size, Rent Price (bold), Distance badge.

Dress_Detail.layout: 2-column on desktop. Left: Image gallery (1 main, thumbnails below). Right: Title, Price, Owner Profile Card, Availability Calendar, CTAs (Request to Rent).
Dress_Detail.calendar: Shadcn calendar, customized with blush primary color for selected dates.

Upload_Listing.layout: Multi-step or single long flowing form. Image dropzone centered, form fields minimal and spacious.

Profile_Dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation + Main content area. Tabbed interface for Wishlist, Listings, Rentals.
Profile_Dashboard.reputation_score: Prominent circular badge or progress ring showing owner rating (e.g., 4.9/5).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Use #FDFBF7 for page backgrounds and #FFFFFF for cards.
Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1, H2 headings. Use Outfit for body and UI elements.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes with kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='rent-button').
Do not use default Shadcn styles; heavily customize padding (e.g. p-6 or p-8 for cards) and remove hard borders in favor of soft ambient shadows.
Never use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs in the media section.
Ensure the hero section overlay is subtle (e.g., gradient or max black/30 if text overlap is required, otherwise use clean side-by-side layout).
Use Lenis for smooth scrolling and Framer Motion for luxurious hover scale interactions.
